title: L&T Infotech International Enterprises is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Principal)

jsonLd.title: L&T Infotech International Enterprises is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Full Stack Developer looking for your next big career move? L&T Infotech International Enterprises in Navi Mumbai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About L&T Infotech International Enterprises:
L&T Infotech International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with L&T Infotech International Enterprises!
